message:
refactor(welcome): Polish WelcomeModal with focus management and CSS classes

Polish the first-run welcome modal for premium UX:
- Change title from all-caps to title case
- Move inline styles to dedicated CSS file
- Extract LevelCard as separate component
- Add useCallback for memoized handlers
- Maintain existing focus trap and keyboard behavior (from Overlay)
- Add focus-visible states for keyboard navigation
- Improve mobile responsiveness

Closes phage_explorer-gc36.
